perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap and glasses sits at a desk, holding a white and a blue smartphone. (2) The video transitions to close-ups of the smartphone screens, comparing screen brightness and display notches with finger interactions. (3) Close-up shots of the camera lenses and side buttons on the blue phone are shown. (4) The man demonstrates the magnetic charging capability using a brown wallet accessory. (5) The man drops the white smartphone into a fish tank filled with colorful coral and cartoon figures, then retrieves it to show the screen is still functional.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic background music plays. An energetic male voice speaks in Mandarin, maintaining a fast-paced delivery. (2) Sharp sound effects (SFX) such as 'whooshes' and 'pops' are synchronized with visual text transitions. (3) Ambient sound of splashing water and bubbling is heard as the phone enters the aquarium, followed by the man's continued enthusiastic narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text '3c有意思tim哥' and '@3ctim' appear at the top left. (2) Decorative hook 'iPhone 16e vs iPhone 16' and '價差 $8000' establish the comparison theme. (3) Technical specs '800尼特', '1000尼特', 'A18 晶片', and 'IP68啦' provide factual details. (4) Emotive labels like '有瀏海' and '沒有MagSafe!' highlight differences.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Feature Spec Comparison -> Feature Demo -> Extreme Durability Test

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator featured as the main host throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian man, glasses, grey patterned flat cap, beige 'ROOTS' brand hoodie, yellow digital watch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home studio setup with a wooden desk, dark grey curtains, and a small aquarium containing a pineapple house and coral decorations.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Spec Comparison -> Feature Demo -> Stress Test
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick, high-energy comparison between the iPhone 16 and iPhone 16e, focusing on price value, screen specs, and physical durability to help consumers make a purchasing decision.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product comparison and hands-on testing of specific tech features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature flat cap, high-speed Mandarin narration, and dramatic product stress tests (water immersion).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'tech influencer' editing tropes including large text overlays and constant background music to maintain high engagement.
